Background

About Me

I'm MD Najmul Huda Rana, widely known as Huda Bhai — a trusted name in Bangladesh's eFootball community. I'm an eFootball Trade Official Midman Worldwide and the admin of 3 major eFootball communities.

I manage eFootball Help Desk BD, eFootball Brand Desk & eFootball International ARENA 2026 — connecting 943K+ players across Bangladesh and the world.

I'm the founder of Huda e-Store™ — Bangladesh's trusted digital gaming goods store. eFootball Coins, PUBG UC, Free Fire Diamonds, Valorant Points, Robux & more.

Proud AC Milan ❤️🖤 supporter. Football — real and virtual — is my passion.
